response.justification: The candidate meets the raw experience bar (roughly 17+ years across web, embedded, and backend systems) and shows entrepreneurial initiative as founder of an open-source geo-data platform, but the trajectory is that of a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer rather than a director-level principal engineer. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI/ML products or platforms shipped at scale, cloud platform strategy work, or influence at the organizational or industry level that this AI-strategy role requires; recent MCP/agent-tooling exposure is promising but too recent and too narrow to close that gap.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains an open-source GIS platform used in production by NGOs
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling)
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI/ML expertise or AI-powered products built at platform scale
Career history is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy, advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Seniority gap vs director-level strategy scope
Deep, broad engineering experience exceeding 15 years
